_description: CloudflareTerraform — upstream images consumed by the cloudflare-backup meta image. The monitor tracks digests on floating tags and triggers a release when an upstream image moves.

images.name: backuphelper
images.description: Central BackupHelper engine — base for src/cloudflare-backup; rebuilds when the digest moves.

images.name: opentofu
images.description: OpenTofu minimal image — the tofu binary is multi-stage-copied into cloudflare-backup. Pinned tag (>= 1.11 for provider-v5 write-only attributes).
